name: Shrimp and Rice
recipeIngredient: 7 ounces (2 packs) Shrimp, frozen, deveined and shelled
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, mix all ingredients except rice and shrimp.
Stir occasionally.
2. Cook gently, uncovered until celery is neatly tender (about 30 minutes).
3. Add the shrimp to the skillet and bring to a gentle boil.
Cook until shrimp are cooked through but still tender (about 5-10 minutes).
4. Prepare the long-grain rice as directed, omitting any added margarine or butter.
5. Serve the shrimp over the cooked rice.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 BREAD/STARCH EXCHANGE + 2 LEAN MEAT EXCHANGES + 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE CAL: 215
Source: Recipes for Diabetics by Billie Little (1985 version)
Brought to you and yours via Nancy O'Brion and her Meal-Master
